attributes.description: This dashboard shows overview of Email DLP logs collected by the Zscaler ZIA integration.

params.markdown:
**Zscaler ZIA**

This dashboard delivers a comprehensive overview of Email DLP logs. It features key metric highlighting allowed and blocked transactions, average DLP engine scan times, and unique senders. It includes bar charts breaking down the top triggered DLP rules, active DLP engines, attachment file types, and triggered vs. other recipients. Additionally, a timeline chart tracks Email DLP trends over time by severity level, while detailed tables surface the top DLP dictionaries and flagged attachment file names.

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/zscaler_zia/overview)

panelsJSON.title: Event Trend over Time by Severity

attributes.title: [Logs Zscaler ZIA] Email DLP Logs
